member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.AiCatalogException
member.summary: Base exception for all AI Catalog operations.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.AiCatalogException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.AiCatalogException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified message.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.AiCatalogException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified message and inner exception.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog
member.summary: Top-level AI Catalog document containing entries and optional host, collections, and metadata. Maps to the root object of an application/ai-catalog+json document.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog.SpecVersion
member.summary: The specification version of this catalog (e.g., "1.0").

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog.Entries
member.summary: The list of catalog entries describing AI artifacts.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog.Host
member.summary: Optional host information for the catalog operator.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog.Collections
member.summary: Optional collection references for partitioning the catalog.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog.Metadata
member.summary: Optional open metadata map for extension data.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation
member.summary: An attestation representing a verifiable proof (audit report, compliance cert, etc.).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.Type
member.summary: The attestation type (e.g., "SOC2-Type2") (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.Uri
member.summary: URI to the attestation document (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.MediaType
member.summary: Media type of the attestation document (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.Digest
member.summary: Optional digest of the attestation document (e.g., "sha256:abc...").

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.Size
member.summary: Optional size in bytes of the attestation document (must be non-negative).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Attestation.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry
member.summary: A single catalog entry describing an AI artifact. Must have exactly one of or .

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Identifier
member.summary: The unique identifier for this entry.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.DisplayName
member.summary: The human-readable display name.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.MediaType
member.summary: The IANA media type describing the artifact format.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Url
member.summary: URL to the artifact. Mutually exclusive with .

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Inline
member.summary: Inline artifact content (opaque JSON value). Mutually exclusive with .

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Version
member.summary: Optional version string for multi-version entries.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description of the artifact.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Tags
member.summary: Optional string tags for categorization.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Publisher
member.summary: Optional publisher information.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.TrustManifest
member.summary: Optional trust manifest for this entry.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Optional RFC 3339 datetime when the entry was last updated.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.Metadata
member.summary: Optional open metadata map for extension data.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CatalogEntry.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CollectionReference
member.summary: A reference to another catalog (collection) for partitioning.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CollectionReference.DisplayName
member.summary: The human-readable display name (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CollectionReference.Url
member.summary: The URL to the referenced catalog (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CollectionReference.Description
member.summary: Optional description of the collection.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CollectionReference.Tags
member.summary: Optional string tags for categorization.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.CollectionReference.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo
member.summary: Host information describing the catalog operator.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo.DisplayName
member.summary: The human-readable display name (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo.Identifier
member.summary: Optional identifier for the host.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo.DocumentationUrl
member.summary: Optional URL to host documentation.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo.LogoUrl
member.summary: Optional URL or data URI for the host logo.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo.TrustManifest
member.summary: Optional trust manifest for the host.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.HostInfo.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink
member.summary: A provenance link describing lineage and origin of an artifact.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.Relation
member.summary: The relation type (e.g., "publishedFrom", "derivedFrom") (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.SourceId
member.summary: The source identifier (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.SourceDigest
member.summary: Optional digest of the source.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.RegistryUri
member.summary: Optional registry URI.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.StatementUri
member.summary: Optional statement URI.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.SignatureRef
member.summary: Optional signature reference.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.ProvenanceLink.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Publisher
member.summary: Publisher information for a catalog entry.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Publisher.Identifier
member.summary: The publisher's identifier (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Publisher.DisplayName
member.summary: The publisher's display name (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Publisher.IdentityType
member.summary: Optional identity type (e.g., "did", "urn").

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.Publisher.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest
member.summary: Trust manifest containing identity, attestations, provenance, and policy information.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.Identity
member.summary: The identity this trust manifest is about (required). Must match the containing entry's identifier.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.IdentityType
member.summary: Optional identity type (e.g., "did", "urn").

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.TrustSchema
member.summary: Optional trust schema defining the trust framework.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.Attestations
member.summary: Optional list of attestations (verifiable proofs).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.Provenance
member.summary: Optional provenance links (lineage records).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.PrivacyPolicyUrl
member.summary: Optional privacy policy URL.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.TermsOfServiceUrl
member.summary: Optional terms of service URL.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.Signature
member.summary: Optional cryptographic signature.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.Metadata
member.summary: Optional open metadata map for extension data.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustManifest.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustSchema
member.summary: Trust schema defining the trust framework and verification methods.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustSchema.Identifier
member.summary: The trust schema identifier (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustSchema.Version
member.summary: The trust schema version (required).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustSchema.GovernanceUri
member.summary: Optional URI to the governance document.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustSchema.VerificationMethods
member.summary: Optional list of verification methods (e.g., "did", "x509", "dns-01").

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.TrustSchema.ExtensionData
member.summary: Unknown properties at the object level, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Parsing.AiCatalogParseException
member.summary: Exception thrown when JSON cannot be parsed into an AI Catalog document.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Parsing.AiCatalogParseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Parsing.AiCatalogParseException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified message and inner exception.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Parsing.AiCatalogParser
member.summary: Parses JSON into instances. Does NOT validate conformance — use for that.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Parsing.AiCatalogParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a JSON string into an .
member.exception: Thrown when the JSON is malformed or has type mismatches.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Parsing.AiCatalogParser.Parse(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Parses a JSON stream into an .
member.exception: Thrown when the JSON is malformed or has type mismatches.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Serialization.AiCatalogSerializer
member.summary: Serializes instances to JSON. Omits null optional fields and preserves metadata values exactly.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Serialization.AiCatalogSerializer.Serialize(SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog)
member.summary: Serializes an to a JSON string.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Serialization.AiCatalogSerializer.Serialize(SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Serializes an to a stream.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.AiCatalogValidator
member.summary: Validates instances against the AI Card specification conformance levels.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.AiCatalogValidator.Validate(SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog)
member.summary: Validates a catalog and auto-detects the highest conformance level.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.AiCatalogValidator.Validate(SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Models.AiCatalog,SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ConformanceLevel)
member.summary: Validates a catalog against a specific conformance level.
member.param: The conformance level to validate against.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.AiCatalogValidator.MajorMinorPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\d+\\.\\d+$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.AiCatalogValidator.DateOnlyPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 2 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 2 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ConformanceLevel
member.summary: Conformance levels as defined by the AI Card specification.

member.name: F:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ConformanceLevel.Minimal
member.summary: Level 1: specVersion + entries with required fields.

member.name: F:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ConformanceLevel.Discoverable
member.summary: Level 2: Minimal + host with displayName.

member.name: F:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ConformanceLevel.Trusted
member.summary: Level 3: Discoverable + trustManifest on entries and/or host.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.DiagnosticSeverity
member.summary: Severity of a validation diagnostic.

member.name: F:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.DiagnosticSeverity.Error
member.summary: An error that prevents conformance at the current level.

member.name: F:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.DiagnosticSeverity.Warning
member.summary: A warning that does not prevent conformance but indicates a potential issue.

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationDiagnostic
member.summary: A single validation diagnostic (error or warning).
member.param: JSON pointer-style path to the element (e.g., "entries[0].trustManifest.identity").

member.name: M:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationDiagnostic.#ctor(SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.DiagnosticSeverity,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A single validation diagnostic (error or warning).
member.param: JSON pointer-style path to the element (e.g., "entries[0].trustManifest.identity").

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationDiagnostic.Severity
member.summary: Error or warning.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationDiagnostic.Message
member.summary: Human-readable description of the issue.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationDiagnostic.Path
member.summary: JSON pointer-style path to the element (e.g., "entries[0].trustManifest.identity").

member.name: T:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationResult
member.summary: The result of validating an AI Catalog document.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationResult.IsValid
member.summary: Whether the catalog is valid (has no errors at the evaluated level).

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationResult.ConformanceLevel
member.summary: The highest conformance level the catalog satisfies.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationResult.Errors
member.summary: Validation errors.

member.name: P:SpecWorks.AiCatalog.Validation.ValidationResult.Warnings
member.summary: Validation warnings.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the MajorMinorPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.MajorMinorPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the DateOnlyPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DateOnlyPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.
